name: Love's Travel Stop (Athens/Tanner area)
reason: No Love's could be confirmed on I-65 in Limestone/Morgan (Segment 1); nearest confirmed Love's are Cullman (Exit 305) and Falkville (Exit 322), both south of Decatur and out of segment. A stale directory entry ('Highway 20') could not be verified.

name: Sanicare Wash Systems
reason: Single directory source; State Docks Rd location is at the river port well off I-65 and current operation could not be corroborated.

name: Bulkmatic Transport Co
reason: Private bulk-carrier terminal tank wash, not a public truck wash.

name: T & T Tire
reason: Appears to overlap with Athens Auto Tire & Wrecker Service (shared phone/ownership); could not disambiguate as a separate truck-service location.

name: 4 Road Service (Athens dispatch)
reason: National mobile-dispatch directory brand, not a distinct physical local business; no street address.

name: FYX Fleet Services / Road Rescue Network / Atlanta Mobile Tire
reason: National/regional dispatch aggregators, not verifiable physical locations in this segment.

name: Owens Quik Mart
reason: Approximately 8 miles from I-65 on AL-24; outside the I-65 corridor for this segment.

name: Sibley Food and Fuel
reason: About 25 miles from I-65 Exit 340; outside the corridor.

name: Fuel Express
reason: On US-72 in Huntsville, ~24 miles from I-65; outside the corridor.

name: Cracker Barrel Athens
reason: Offers passenger/RV parking only, not designated truck parking; not a truck service location.

name: Pilot Travel Center (3240 Point Mallard 'Decatur' listing)
reason: Same facility as the published Pilot #441 Priceville listing (city correctly resolves to Priceville); excluded to avoid duplicate host row.

name: North Alabama Washout (291 Truck Wash)
reason: Out of segment - located at I-65 Exit 291, south of the seg2 range (exits 299-334).

name: Dodge City Shell
reason: Minor fuel station (reported 1-2 truck spaces); not a distinct freight/truck-stop-scale facility beyond the adjacent Petro Dodge City. Insufficient to list as a separate freight facility.

name: Quala Wash - Hanceville
reason: Industrial tank/tanker wash; on-I-65 accessibility, exact address and current operating status could not be independently confirmed.

name: Sleep Inn & Suites Cullman
reason: Truck parking claimed by a single directory only; address/identity and truck parking could not be independently confirmed.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash
reason: No Blue Beacon location exists on I-65 in this segment; nearest is in the Tuscaloosa/Cottondale area (I-20/59).

name: I-65 weigh station (seg2)
reason: No permanent weigh/inspection station could be confirmed on I-65 between exits 299 and 334; documented Alabama I-65 weigh facilities are further north (Athens NB/SB) and south. Omitted rather than guessed.

name: JM Onsite Repair / Fleet Clean (mobile)
reason: Mobile-only roadside/wash services with no fixed I-65 exit location; no verifiable fixed facility to list.

name: Sunoco (510 US Highway 31, Warrior)
reason: Gas/convenience station at I-65 Exit 284 area; no confirmed truck parking or truck-stop facilities. Not a freight facility.

name: Shell / Finley Blvd truck stop (1901 Finley Blvd)
reason: I-65 Exit 262B, south of this segment's range (belongs to the Birmingham segment); sources also indicate no overnight truck parking.

name: Firestone Complete Auto Care (1105 Main St)
reason: Passenger/light-vehicle auto and tire shop; not a heavy-truck / semi tire service and not directly serving I-65 freight traffic.

name: Warrior Tire & Auto
reason: Passenger auto repair and tire shop; not a confirmed heavy-truck tire/roadside service off an I-65 exit.

name: Truck stop at I-65 Exit 275 (Kimberly/Morris/Mount Olive)
reason: No truck stop exists; Exit 275 confirmed to have gas/restaurants only, no dedicated truck facility.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash — Birmingham
reason: Listed as 'Coming Soon' / not yet open on Blue Beacon's site (planned at ~2401 20th St N, I-65 Exit 262B). Excluded as not-yet-operating; also just north of segment.

name: Pilot Travel Center / ONE9 (3201 Buttermilk Rd)
reason: Located on I-20/I-59 at Exit 77 in Cottondale, not on I-65 — outside seg4. Initial directory snippet mis-associated it with Alabaster Exit 238.

name: Speedco Truck Lube & Tires (Buttermilk Rd)
reason: On I-20/I-59 in Cottondale, not I-65 in the Birmingham metro segment. No Speedco/Love's Truck Care found on I-65 exits 228-261.

name: Pilot Travel Center / Flying J #602 (Daniel Payne Dr)
reason: At I-65 Exit 264 (Daniel Payne Dr), north of the seg4 range (exits 228-261).

name: Love's Travel Stop
reason: Nearest I-65 Love's locations are Prichard (Exit 8) and Cullman (Exit 305) — both far outside the Birmingham-metro segment.

name: Love's Travel Stop #718
reason: Real Love's location but at I-65 Exit 158 in Hope Hull, south of Montgomery - outside seg5 range (exits 179-228).

name: Reported 'Love's Truck Care / Speedco, 1408 S Memorial Dr, Prattville'
reason: Could not verify; no Love's Truck Care or Speedco confirmed in Prattville. Address appears to be an unverified/AI-summary artifact. Nearest confirmed Love's Truck Care is Clanton (Exit 208). Excluded to avoid fabrication.

name: I-65 Alabama weigh station (Autauga/Chilton County)
reason: No permanent scale house or weigh station could be confirmed on I-65 within exits 179-228. Alabama uses weigh-in-motion sites (e.g., Athens far north) and permanent scales elsewhere; nothing in-segment verifiable via ALDOT/coopsareopen/directories.

name: Semi truck washes (151 Truck Wash / Hanceville washouts)
reason: Nearest semi truck-wash results are in central Montgomery (401 Paul Rd) and Hanceville (I-65 Exit 291) - not confidently within the seg5 corridor (exits 179-228). No truck wash confirmed in Jemison/Clanton/Prattville/Millbrook.

name: TruckParkingClub private lots (Prattville)
reason: App-reserved private parking listings, not verifiable public freight facilities; excluded.

name: Love's Travel Stop #360 (Atmore area)
reason: Could not independently confirm existence/location within this segment. Directory titles reference '#360 | I-65 Exit 58,' but repeated searches of I-65 Exit 57 (AL-21, Atmore) returned only Chevron/Diamond gas — no Love's — and no address, phone, or official Love's page could be verified. Excluded to avoid guessing.

name: Comfort Inn (Greenville)
reason: Listed at I-65 Exit 130 in a truck-stop directory, but truck/large-vehicle parking availability could not be independently confirmed; not included as a Hotel with Truck Parking without verification.

name: I-65 weigh station (Conecuh/Butler counties)
reason: No official ALDOT/ALEA weigh or inspection station could be confirmed at a specific location/direction in this segment; sources indicate Alabama uses weigh-in-motion. Omitted rather than guess.

name: TA Mobile (Grand Bay)
reason: Located on I-10 at Exit 4 (9201 Grand Bay Wilmer Rd), ~15 mi west of the I-65/I-10 interchange serving I-10 traffic, not I-65. Out of segment.

name: Buc-ee's / Loxley truck facilities
reason: Baldwin County facilities are on I-10, not on I-65 in this segment.

name: Satsuma Chevron
reason: Roadside Chevron fuel/C-store ~1.4 mi off Exit 19; truck-stop/truck-parking status and category-fit not confirmed.

name: Bubba's Food Store
reason: C-store near Exit 19/22; not a confirmed truck facility.

name: Diamond Gasoline #21
reason: Fuel/C-store near Exit 54; truck-facility identity and status single-sourced/unconfirmed.

name: RJ's (Hwy 21)
reason: Store/deli; truck-facility category-fit not confirmed, single source.

name: McIntyre Travel Center
reason: Directory name at 193 Hwy 83 appears to be the same or immediately adjacent site as Spirit Travel Center (192 Hwy 83); excluded to avoid duplicate listing.

name: Diamond Gas (16070 Hwy 84)
reason: Fuel/C-store near Exit 93; not a confirmed distinct truck facility, single source.

name: Truck Parking Club lot (300 Ewing Lane)
reason: User-hosted paid parking listing; existence/legitimacy not independently corroborated (single source).

name: Atmore truck wash (970 Woods Rd)
reason: Unnamed truck-wash entry, single source; identity and operating status unconfirmed.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash
reason: Nearest Blue Beacon is in Cottondale (north Alabama), far outside the segment.

name: Physical weigh station on I-65 (exits 0-96)
reason: No permanent physical weigh station in this range could be confirmed; Alabama relies largely on weigh-in-motion/mobile enforcement. ALDOT/ALEA and coopsareopen pages blocked by egress policy. Omitted rather than guessed.
